title: Operational active-campaign registry (GITIGNORED — never tracked)
description: Schema for the operational registry at the canonical state location (C:\PZ-main\.claude\state\active-campaigns.json). Mutable live campaign state lives ONLY there, never in a tracked file (operator ruling 2026-07-17). Edited only by the named owner session or the operator.

branch.description: Campaign branch name (exactly one implementation owner).

worktree.description: The ONE registered worktree for this campaign.

expected_head.description: Operator-approved target SHA — ALWAYS the campaign BRANCH-TIP SHA, never a main-side/squash-merge SHA (ADR-campaign-state-lifecycle-sha-authority, 2026-07-19). Main-side provenance belongs in `merge`. Divergence from the actual tip is an INCIDENT to report — never auto-correct; a stale file must never drive a reset.

last_verified_head.description: What read-only verification actually found at last check. May lag expected_head; divergence => incident report + operator ruling.

state.description: Lifecycle state (operator second ruling §5/§6). MERGED_PENDING_ARCHIVE/FROZEN/LOCKED/DEPLOYING/ARCHIVED are write-restricted: the guard denies commit/reset/rebase/cherry-pick/merge EVEN FOR THE OWNER — ownership match alone never permits a write. A state outside this enum is NOT permitted to fall through to write-permitted behaviour: the guard fails closed with an explicit `ask` (ADR-campaign-state-lifecycle-sha-authority, 2026-07-19).

merge.description: OPTIONAL main-side provenance for a merged campaign. INERT: no guard may compare any field here against worktree HEAD — the branch-tip authority is `expected_head` alone. Exists so a merged campaign never overloads `expected_head` with a main-side SHA (ADR-campaign-state-lifecycle-sha-authority, 2026-07-19). Deployment/UAT/production-completion state does NOT belong here — that is owned by PROJECT_STATE.md.

pr.description: GitHub PR number that merged this campaign.

squash_sha.description: Squash-merge commit on main. Provenance only — never compared with worktree HEAD.

phase.description: The gate the campaign is waiting on or passing through, e.g. WAITING_FOR_PR924 (§5: a session reads the whole lifecycle, not merely which branch exists).

heartbeat.description: Advisory top-level owner heartbeat (§5 entry shape); enforcement uses lock.heartbeat_at.

chartered_decision.description: Human label of the operator-ratified decision governing this branch tip.

lock.description: Write-lock held by the active owner session. null = unclaimed; guard escalates to the operator on any write while unclaimed.
